# CWE-829: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-829-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"plugin"
)

// Vulnerable: loads a shared object from a user-supplied filesystem path.
func LoadExtension(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	path := r.URL.Query().Get("module_path")
	p, err := plugin.Open(path)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	sym, err := p.Lookup("Init")
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]bool{"loaded": sym != nil})
}
